rows.description: Computus Johannis Cole Collegii Canonici Rectoria 2do die Novembris A.D. 1799 ad eundem diem revolutum A.D. 1800
rows.notes: Top-of-page Latin heading; several words are faded and in cursive. Date portion is legible enough to read 'die Novembris A.D. 1799 ... revolutum A.D. 1800' but some letters uncertain (hence 0.6). No numeric currency columns present.
rows.section_header: Computus Johannis Cole Collegii Canonici Rectoria 2do die Novembris A.D. 1799 ad eundem diem revolutum A.D. 1800

rows.notes: Centered section heading in flowing script; word appears as 'Arrearagiae' / 'Arrearage' style — letters slightly ornate and the middle vowel ambiguous. No amounts in this row.
Clear English heading in larger script 'Money Rents fixed'. No monetary columns on this row.
Description 'Kidlington Rectory' is legible. Amount aligned under pounds column as '18' with shillings and pence columns blank (interpreted as 0s). Vertical ruling lines are unambiguous here.
rows.english_description: Annual rent due from the Kidlington rectory (provisional/turn deduction indicated).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent due from the Kidlington rectory (provisional/turn deduction indicated), amounting to £18 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description reads 'Lady Jane - Compton' (the connecting abbreviation 'Do' present). Amount clearly reads '8' in pounds column and '8' in shillings column; pence blank. Slight ambiguity in the second word of description but amounts well aligned.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from Lady Jane Compton for Compton (rectory implied).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Lady Jane Compton for Compton, amounting to £8 8s 0d.

rows.notes: Line begins with 'Do' (meaning same as above). Following surname is partly smudged; looks like 'Wilson' but uncertain. Amount shows '6' in pounds column; shillings/pence blank. Slight uncertainty due to handwriting of name.
rows.english_description: Annual rent for the Wilson rectory (entry uses same rectory type as previous lines).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent for the Wilson rectory, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Another 'Do' line; surname reads 'Richford' fairly clearly. Amount columns show '1' in pounds and '10' in shillings. Pence blank. Alignment clear and values in valid ranges.
rows.english_description: Annual rent for the Richford rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent for the Richford rectory, amounting to £1 10s 0d.

rows.notes: The collegiate name appears to be 'Jesus College' (handwriting close to 'Jes us' — some letters merged). Amount reads as '1' pounds and '10' shillings in aligned columns. Slight uncertainty on exact college spelling but amounts clear.
rows.english_description: Rent payment received from Jesus College.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent payment received from Jesus College, amounting to £1 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Description looks like 'Wild Arish' or 'Wild Parish' — letters ambiguous. Amounts read as '6' pounds and '6' shillings (the graphic shows '6.6.'). Pence blank. Moderate uncertainty on the name, amounts alignment clear.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the Wild parish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from the Wild parish, amounting to £6 6s 0d.

rows.notes: Reads 'Gwinear Rectory' with parenthetical 'P.T. ded' (provincial deduction) clearly. Amount '81' unmistakable in pounds column; shillings/pence blank.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from the Gwinear rectory (per turn deduction noted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from the Gwinear rectory (per turn deduction noted), amounting to £81 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Clear section header 'Land Tax Redeemed' in larger script. No amounts in this row.
Entry 'Kidlington Rectory' matches earlier phrasing. Amount columns read '22' (pounds), '5' (shillings), '6' (pence) clearly and are within valid ranges.
rows.english_description: Receipt relating to land tax redemption for the Kidlington rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt relating to land tax redemption for the Kidlington rectory, amounting to £22 5s 6d.

rows.notes: Description appears as 'L. Wittenham' or 'L. Witherham' followed by 'Do (P.T. ded)'; handwriting of place uncertain. Amount aligned as '25' pounds and '4' shillings. Pence blank. Moderate uncertainty on place name.
rows.english_description: Receipt for land tax redemption at Little Wittenham (per turn deduction noted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt for land tax redemption at Little Wittenham (per turn deduction noted), amounting to £25 4s 0d.

rows.notes: 'Do - Vicarage' is written; amount reads '4' pounds and '4' shillings. Description short and clear enough but 'Do' implies repetition from prior line so kept as-is.
rows.english_description: Receipt relating to land tax redemption for the Little Wittenham vicarage.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt relating to land tax redemption for the Little Wittenham vicarage, amounting to £4 4s 0d.

rows.notes: Clear section heading 'Mixed Rents Variable'. No amounts in header row.
Reads 'S. Newington Rectory (P.T. ded)'. Amount reads '164' pounds, '16' shillings, '2' pence clearly. All values within valid ranges and column alignment clear.
rows.english_description: Variable rent received from the South Newington rectory (per turn deduction noted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Variable rent received from the South Newington rectory (per turn deduction noted), amounting to £164 16s 2d.

rows.notes: Place name appears as 'Gampton' or 'Garnton' (handwritten letter ambiguous). The line includes 'Do - Tenement' indicating similar category. Amount '83' pounds and '10' shillings are reasonably clear; pence blank. Moderate uncertainty on place spelling.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the Gampton tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from the Gampton tenement, amounting to £83 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Description 'Chace Hill' (could be 'Chace' or 'Chase') but legible. Amount columns read '26.4.6' clearly; values valid.
rows.english_description: Rent received from Chase Hill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Chase Hill, amounting to £26 4s 6d.

rows.notes: Line reads 'Kidlington Mills (P.T. ded)'. Pounds/shillings read '17' and '12' clearly. Pence column shows '2' with a small trailing loop indicating three-quarters (appears as '2 3/4') — interpreted as 0.75 fraction. Fraction marker is a little faint but plausible.
rows.english_description: Variable rent received from the Kidlington mills (per turn deduction noted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Variable rent received from the Kidlington mills (per turn deduction noted), amounting to £17 12s 2.75d.

rows.notes: Place reads 'Garsington' then a hyphen and a following word that looks like 'Clerkland' or 'Clinkard' — uncertain. Amount '18.17.6' visible and within valid ranges; column alignment clear.
rows.english_description: Rent from Clerkland at Garsington (tenancy/parcel referred to as Clerkland).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from Clerkland at Garsington, amounting to £18 17s 6d.

rows.notes: Second 'Do' line with a short word after the hyphen that might be 'Fruin' or 'Fruit' — handwriting unclear. Amount reads '8.17.6' but the description is uncertain, hence lower confidence.
rows.english_description: Rent from Fruin (tenant/holding at Garsington) recorded as a variable receipt.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from Fruin (Garsington holding), amounting to £8 17s 6d.

rows.notes: Place name reads 'Tritonhulle Napier' or 'Trintonhulle Napier' (letters archaic but legible enough). Amount '16.3.2' is clearly aligned. Moderate certainty on spelling of place.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the Trintonhulle Napier holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from the Trintonhulle Napier holding, amounting to £16 3s 2d.

rows.notes: Clear reading 'Clifton Ferry'. Amount reads '9.3.2' and columns align well; values within valid ranges.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the Clifton Ferry holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from the Clifton Ferry holding, amounting to £9 3s 2d.

rows.notes: Place appears as 'Benrington' (could be 'Bensington' but readable). Pence column shows '3' with a small half-penny loop clearly visible (interpreted as 0.5). Amount '7.13.3½' thus recorded.
rows.english_description: Variable rent received from Benrington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Variable rent received from Benrington, amounting to £7 13s 3.5d.

rows.notes: Reads 'S. Newington Tenement'. Amount shows '2' pounds, '19' shillings, and pence '2' with a halfpenny mark (appears as '2½'); fraction interpreted as 0.5. Column alignment consistent.
rows.english_description: Rent from a South Newington tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from a South Newington tenement, amounting to £2 19s 2.5d.

rows.notes: This is a subtotal/total line 'Recepta Anni presentis'. Amount reads '519.4.9 3/4' with a clear three-quarter (¾) mark after the pence — interpreted as 0.75 fraction. Column alignment and total format are clear.
Another instance of 'Gwinear Rectory (P.T. ded)' listed below the total. Amount shows '27' in pounds column with shillings/pence blank. Entry text clear though slightly smaller script.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from the Gwinear rectory (per turn deduction noted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from the Gwinear rectory (per turn deduction noted), amounting to £27 0s 0d.

rows.notes: The line appears to read 'Kidlington Capron & V?ravine' or similar; middle portion is smudged and uncertain. Amount reads '2.15.0' (2 pounds 15 shillings). Moderate uncertainty due to unclear place phrase.
rows.english_description: Variable receipt relating to Kidlington (described as 'Capron and ravine' in the source).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Variable receipt relating to Kidlington ('Capron and ravine' item), amounting to £2 15s 0d.

rows.notes: This line repeats a Wild ... name. Handwriting suggests 'Wild Parish' (earlier rendered 'Wild Arish'); amount shown '6.6.0'. Uncertainty only in the exact spelling of the place name; amount alignment clear.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the Wild parish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from the Wild parish, amounting to £6 6s 0d.

rows.notes: Repeated section heading 'Mixed Rents variable' (lower on page). Script clear and centered-ish. No amount on this row.
Reads 'Kidlington Augmentation (P.T.D)'. Pounds column reads '134' and shillings '6'; pence blank. Parenthetical abbreviation is visible though small. Alignment with ruling lines clear.
rows.english_description: Augmentation income from the Kidlington benefice.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation income from the Kidlington benefice, amounting to £134 6s 0d.

rows.notes: Final underlined figure at page bottom reads '170.7.-'. It appears to be a page/section total. Alignment is slightly to the right and the context implies a total; confidence moderate because its exact relationship to previous lines (which numbers were summed) is assumed from placement.
